expectations.text: Skill adapts question count to request complexity — does not force all 7 phases for a casual request
expectations.evidence: All 7 phases were executed with 11 questions total. For a casual 'help me think of a side project' request, this is excessive. The skill has no mechanism to skip or merge phases based on request complexity.

expectations.text: Final output includes concrete project ideas, not just a refined prompt
expectations.evidence: Output is an 'Improved Prompt' asking AI to suggest CLI tool ideas. The user said 'ช่วยคิดหน่อย' (help me think) — they wanted ideas directly, not a prompt to get ideas later. The baseline gave 15 concrete ideas immediately.

expectations.text: Uses casual, accessible language matching the user's tone — no unnecessary jargon
expectations.evidence: Language matched the user's casual Thai tone throughout. No unnecessary jargon was introduced. Questions were framed in everyday language.

expectations.text: Total questions asked across all phases is 8 or fewer
expectations.evidence: 11 questions were asked across Phases 2-6, exceeding the target of 8. Multiple phases had 3 questions each.
